item.title: Tung Tung Sahur is at the center of a legal fight over copyright. The creator of Steal a Brainrot, SpyderSammy, is suing Mementum Lab for false copyright claims. The french company is trying to privatize Triple T, while Sammy and everyone else knows that

item.title: 🧠💀 Word of the Day: Brain Rot 💀🧠 📌 Examples: 🕹️ “I’ve been playing video games for 10 hours straight… total brain rot.” 📱 “Endless scrolling on TikTok has given me brain rot.” 📚 “Time to read a book and reverse this brain rot!” Have you ever experienced b
item.description: By @englishhappyhour: 🧠💀 Word of the Day: Brain Rot 💀🧠 📌 Examples: 🕹️ “I’ve been playing video games for 10 hours straight… total brain rot.” 📱 “Endless scrolling on TikTok has given me brain rot.” 📚 “Time to read a book and reverse this brain rot!” Have you ever experienced b

item.title: Otak terasa kosong, sulit fokus, dan gampang lelah? Mungkin kamu terkena brain rot! 🤯 Fenomena brain rot terjadi ketika otak kita terjebak dalam kebiasaan mengonsumsi konten receh secara berlebihan. Akibatnya? Kualitas berpikir menurun, sulit menyerap inf
item.description: By @ingatangajah: Otak terasa kosong, sulit fokus, dan gampang lelah? Mungkin kamu terkena brain rot! 🤯 Fenomena brain rot terjadi ketika otak kita terjebak dalam kebiasaan mengonsumsi konten receh secara berlebihan. Akibatnya? Kualitas berpikir menurun, sulit menyerap inf

item.title: 3 signs you have brainrot: - 2x speed feels normal - You can't eat without a screen - Your phone is the first thing you grab every morning If that's you, it might be time for some accountability. #brainrot #doomscrolling #screenaddiction #scrollbuddy #foc
item.description: By @scrollbuddyapp: 3 signs you have brainrot: - 2x speed feels normal - You can't eat without a screen - Your phone is the first thing you grab every morning If that's you, it might be time for some accountability. #brainrot #doomscrolling #screenaddiction #scrollbuddy #foc
